prestazioni: F4R 2.0L 16V (F4R 730/736) engine block reinforced with a Darton MID sleeves for 87.5mm bore, achieving 2.2L displacement with forged Mahle Motorsport pistons (87.5mm, 12.5:1 CR) and Eagle H-beam connecting rods (5.433" length)

Garrett GT35R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) with a custom 3" stainless steel exhaust manifold by Janspeed Engineering, paired with a GReddy Type-R front-mount intercooler (600x200x76mm core) and a Tial MV-R 50mm wastegate

Ohlins TTX40 4-way adjustable coilovers with spherical bearing top mounts, custom-valved for the Megane Maxi's MacPherson strut front and multi-link rear, using Eibach ERS 1200N/mm springs (front) and 800N/mm (rear)
estetica: Pro-Alloy Motorsport Group A-style widebody kit with carbon fiber front fenders (25mm wider per side), rear quarter panels (30mm wider per side), and a 3-piece carbon fiber rear diffuser by Seibon Carbon

Sparco Chrono 15"x10" (front) and 15"x11" (rear) magnesium wheels with 225/40R15 (front) and 255/40R15 (rear) Yokohama A052 semi-slick tires, wrapped in custom Group A livery by Vialle Motorsport Graphics

Custom aluminum roll cage by Safety Devices (FIA Appendix J compliant) with integrated fire suppression system (Lifeline Zero 360 4kg extinguisher) and Recaro Pole Position II seats with Sabelt 6-point harnesses
